title: FPSTODOMOON Vulcan Edition
description: This modpack is Vulcan Edition of the FPSTODOMOON Modpack. Less laggy gameplay then sodium. İt includes variety of fps boosting mods and aims to a better gaming experience.
body:
### 🚀 FPSTODOMOON Vulcan Edition – A New Era of Minecraft Performance!

Struggling with low FPS in Minecraft? FPSTODOMOON Vulcan Edition takes optimization to the next level with Vulkan-powered rendering, leaving Sodium behind! Say goodbye to outdated OpenGL bottlenecks and hello to higher FPS, smoother animations, and improved visuals.
🔥 Why VulkanMod Over Sodium?

Sodium is good, but not good enough! VulkanMod builds on Sodium’s optimizations and takes advantage of Vulkan API for next-level performance:

✅ **Higher FPS** – Vulkan’s advanced rendering pipeline makes your GPU work more efficiently, reducing frame rendering times.

✅ **Eliminates Stutter & Micro-Lag** – Unlike OpenGL, Vulkan directly communicates with your GPU, ensuring more stable frame rates.

✅ **Superior Shader Performance** – Faster and more optimized shading, leading to better lighting and effects compared to Sodium.

✅ **Better CPU & GPU Load Distribution** – Vulkan balances processing loads more effectively, boosting FPS significantly on multi-core systems.

✅ **The Best Alternative Rendering Engine** – Unlike Sodium, VulkanMod is built on a more modern and powerful graphics processing technology.

In short, VulkanMod = More FPS, Smoother Gameplay, Better Visuals!
🔧 Handpicked Mods for Ultimate Performance

⚡ **FerriteCore** – Optimizes RAM usage, making even large modpacks run smoother.

⚡ **Lithium** – Improves physics and AI calculations for a lag-free experience.

⚡ **Dynamic FPS** – Prevents unnecessary resource usage when the game is running in the background.

⚡ **Entity Culling & More Culling** – Smartly avoids rendering unseen objects, boosting FPS.

⚡ **ImmediatelyFast** – Enhances rendering performance, reducing UI lag and improving responsiveness.

⚡ **Krypton** – Speeds up server connections, reducing ping and improving multiplayer performance.

### 🚀 Experience Minecraft Like Never Before!

FPSTODOMOON Vulcan Edition goes beyond Sodium, harnessing the power of Vulkan for unmatched FPS and smoothness. Get better graphics, higher frame rates, and an optimized experience like never before. Try it now! 🚀
